title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 28 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/09/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.49% today, the main contract closed 711.5. Some traders were active attitude to sell. Total transactions returned toactive.PBF at Shandong port dealt 745 yuan/mt; increased 2-10 yuan/mt than yesterday.PBF at Tangshan port dealt 758-763 yuan/mt.
